synopsis:
**First Issue in the Prequel Era!**

It begins here: first series focusing on the guardians of peace and justice in the galaxy, the Jedi Knights! Featuring your favorite Jedi like Qui-Gon Jinn, Obi-Wan Kenobi, Yoda and Mace Windu alongside brand-new Jedi sure to become fan favorites! And who is the mysterious new villain targeting Qui-Gon Jinn?
title: Jedi Knights #01
